FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class AnnotatedScrollBar

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

WinUI AnnotatedScrollBar (controls\dev\AnnotatedScrollBar) — the jump-list rail: a column of right-aligned labels beside a thin accent thumb, with CLICK-TO-JUMP on the rail, thumb drag, and repeat-hold increment/decrement buttons. Template facts (AnnotatedScrollBar.xaml + _themeresources.xaml; the _perf2026 variant differs only in storyboard→setter form, identical values): • Control MinWidth = LabelsGridMinWidth 44 (xaml:4, :37) — the control hugs ~44 unless its host stretches it. • Root grid rows: increment RepeatButton on TOP (glyph EDDB, HorizontalAlignment=Right — xaml:31-39), the vertical grid (star), decrement RepeatButton on the BOTTOM (glyph EDDC — xaml:94-102). • Thumb = 30×3 @ r1.5 (ThumbWidth :36 / ThumbHeight :35 / ThumbCornerRadius :41), VerticalThumbBrush = AccentFillColorDefault (:11/:21), HorizontalAlignment=Right + VerticalAlignment=Top at the scroll position (xaml:84-92). • Ghost thumb = same geometry in AccentFillColorDisabled (PART_VerticalThumbGhost xaml:74-83) — the hover preview of where a rail click would land. • PART_LabelsGrid: HorizontalAlignment=Center, MinWidth 44, transparent background (xaml:41-45); the LabelTemplate is a right-aligned BodyTextBlockStyle TextBlock (14px Normal — TextBlock_themeresources.xaml:4/:23) with Margin 0,-5,0,-2 (xaml:8-19). • PART_ToolTipRail: a 1px right-aligned tooltip anchor rail (xaml:46) whose ToolTip is Placement=Top, MaxWidth 360 / MinHeight 40 (:38/:39), BaseTextBlockStyle content (14px SemiBold) — modeled by detailLabel: the resolved text floats in a chip above the pointer (the DetailLabelRequested seam). • ScrollButtonStyle: MinWidth/MinHeight 16 (:43-44), FontSize 8 (:40/:51), CornerRadius = ControlCornerRadius 4 (:49), background SubtleFillColorTransparent in EVERY state (:5; the :56-87 visual states recolor ONLY the foreground: TextFillColorPrimary → Secondary hover → Tertiary pressed → Disabled, :6-9), IsTabStop=False (xaml:37/:100) — each steps by SmallChange (default ViewportSize / ratio — AnnotatedScrollBar.cpp:484-489 EnsureSmallChangeValue). • Rail click / drag / buttons raise Scrolling with the offset + kind, CANCELABLE (AnnotatedScrollBarScrollingEventArgs.Cancel; cpp:960+ RaiseScrolling) — modeled by the onScrolling filter returning false to cancel. ENGINE SEMANTIC (the bug this file once had): inside a ZStack, children land at the LEFT edge and AlignSelf is the VERTICAL overlay placement — RIGHT alignment therefore uses a full-width row wrapper (Direction=0, Justify=FlexJustify.End) per overlay part, never AlignSelf. Thumb position rides a TransformBind on the position signal (compositor-instant, no re-render).

public static class AnnotatedScrollBar

Fields

PartGhost

The hover-preview ghost-thumb row (WinUI PART_VerticalThumbGhost; mounted only while hovering). Owned: Key — the hover-tracking OffsetY is stock per-render placement a modifier sees and may override.

public const string PartGhost = "asb-ghost"

Field Value

string

PartLabels

The labels grid (WinUI PART_LabelsGrid). Owned: Key, Children (the annotations slot — restructure via the annotations list, restyle via this part).

public const string PartLabels = "asb-labels"

Field Value

string

PartRail

The 1px right-aligned tooltip anchor rail row (WinUI PART_ToolTipRail). Owned: Key.

public const string PartRail = "asb-rail"

Field Value

string

PartThumb

The live accent-thumb row (WinUI PART_VerticalThumb). Owned: Key, TransformBind (the compositor-bound scroll position).

public const string PartThumb = "asb-thumb"

Field Value

string

PartTip

The hover detail-chip row (WinUI PART_DetailLabelToolTip; mounted while hovering with a detailLabel). Owned: Key — same OffsetY note as PartGhost.

public const string PartTip = "asb-tip"

Field Value

string

Methods

Create(IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)>, Signal<float>, Action<float, AnnotatedScrollBarScrollKind>?, float, float, Func<float, bool>?, Func<float, string>?, TemplateParts?)

The interactive control. position01 is the normalized scroll position signal (0..1) — writes move the thumb compositor-instantly; onScroll receives every user scroll (new position, kind); onScrolling (optional) may return false to CANCEL a scroll (the WinUI Scrolling.Cancel seam); smallChange01 is the button step (default 0.05 — the SmallChange auto-value stands in for viewport/ratio, cpp:484-489); detailLabel resolves the hover chip text from a position; parts = per-part styling keyed by the PartXxx consts (see TemplateParts for the contract).

public static Element Create(IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)> annotations, Signal<float> position01, Action<float, AnnotatedScrollBarScrollKind>? onScroll, float height = 280, float smallChange01 = 0.05, Func<float, bool>? onScrolling = null, Func<float, string>? detailLabel = null, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

annotations IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)>
position01 Signal<float>
onScroll Action<float, AnnotatedScrollBarScrollKind>
height float
smallChange01 float
onScrolling Func<float, bool>
detailLabel Func<float, string>
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element

Create(IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)>, float, TemplateParts?)

Static/legacy surface (kept source-compatible): annotations as (label, 0..1 position) with no callbacks — renders the full anatomy inert at position 0.2 (the original demo shape).

public static Element Create(IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)> annotations, float height = 280, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

annotations IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)>
height float
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element

Create(IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)>, float, Action<float, AnnotatedScrollBarScrollKind>?, float, float, Func<float, bool>?, Func<float, string>?, TemplateParts?)

The interactive control with a FROZEN position (component props freeze at mount — use the Signal<float> overload below for a live, app-controlled position).

public static Element Create(IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)> annotations, float position01, Action<float, AnnotatedScrollBarScrollKind>? onScroll, float height = 280, float smallChange01 = 0.05, Func<float, bool>? onScrolling = null, Func<float, string>? detailLabel = null, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

annotations IReadOnlyList<(string Label, float Position01)>
position01 float
onScroll Action<float, AnnotatedScrollBarScrollKind>
height float
smallChange01 float
onScrolling Func<float, bool>
detailLabel Func<float, string>
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
